Docs.summary: If upgraded component version contains breaking changes from the current version. To see a detailed description of what the breaking changes are, visit https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/aks/supported-kubernetes-versions?tabs=azure-cli#aks-components-breaking-changes-by-version.
